item.title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
item.description: Follow a girl as she handles her big rig with skill and confidence. Experience life on the road and the challenges of driving a massive truck.

media:content.media:title: A Girl and Her Big Rig
media:content.media:description: Follow a girl as she handles her big rig with skill and confidence. Experience life on the road and the challenges of driving a massive truck.

item.title: Helping a Stuck Tractor
item.description: Watch as we assist a tractor stuck in mud. See the techniques and teamwork used to safely free heavy farm equipment.

media:content.media:title: Helping a Stuck Tractor
media:content.media:description: Watch as we assist a tractor stuck in mud. See the techniques and teamwork used to safely free heavy farm equipment.

item.title: Flying a Crop Duster
item.description: Experience the thrill of flying a crop duster. See the precision and skill required to maneuver over fields for effective crop spraying.

media:content.media:title: Flying a Crop Duster
media:content.media:description: Experience the thrill of flying a crop duster. See the precision and skill required to maneuver over fields for effective crop spraying.

item.title: Loading Corn 101
item.description: Learn the basics of loading corn efficiently and safely, covering techniques, equipment, and tips for a smooth harvest process.

media:content.media:title: Loading Corn 101
media:content.media:description: Learn the basics of loading corn efficiently and safely, covering techniques, equipment, and tips for a smooth harvest process.

item.title: The Hardest Oil Change Ever!
item.description: Watch as we tackle the most challenging oil change yet, dealing with tight spaces, stubborn components, and unexpected obstacles along the way.

media:content.media:title: The Hardest Oil Change Ever!
media:content.media:description: Watch as we tackle the most challenging oil change yet, dealing with tight spaces, stubborn components, and unexpected obstacles along the way.

item.title: Fixing an Irrigation Machine
item.description: Watch the step-by-step process of diagnosing and repairing an irrigation machine to restore proper function and keep water flowing efficiently on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Fixing an Irrigation Machine
media:content.media:description: Watch the step-by-step process of diagnosing and repairing an irrigation machine to restore proper function and keep water flowing efficiently on the farm.

item.title: Can We Start It?
item.description: The moment of anticipation as we attempt to start a machine, engine, or vehicle, capturing the excitement and suspense of whether it will fire up successfully.

media:content.media:title: Can We Start It?
media:content.media:description: The moment of anticipation as we attempt to start a machine, engine, or vehicle, capturing the excitement and suspense of whether it will fire up successfully.
